articles.author: Huizhong Wu
articles.title: What to know about China’s rare ballistic missile test and why it raises concerns - AP News
articles.description: China's navy has test-launched a long-range ballistic missile from a nuclear-powered submarine, showcasing its growing nuclear deterrence capabilities. The launch Monday has drawn protests from the U.S. as well as countries in Asia and the Pacific. Experts sa…
articles.content: BANGKOK (AP) Chinas navy test-launched a long-range ballistic missile Monday from a nuclear-powered submarine a move that experts said showed Beijings increasing skill and capability as part of its n… [+5716 chars]
